purpose: Future merge validation must block or require review when a monthly budget item planned amount was edited differently on both devices and no reliable child-level updatedAt timestamp can resolve the conflict.

expectedStagedResult.reason: Monthly budget item for Test Category was edited on both devices. No child-level updatedAt is available to resolve the conflict without risking silent plan corruption.

expectedReport.message: Monthly budget item conflict requires review. Both devices changed the planned amount and no reliable child timestamp can resolve it.

safetyNotes: Do not apply either version automatically.
Do not mutate account balances from budget changes.
Do not recalculate BudgetGridSnapshot during merge.
Require user review before applying a conflicted planned amount.
